title: RBI tightens rules for banks for disabling/restricting mobile devices in the event of loan default: What you should know | Business News - Hindustan Times
description: RBI tightens rules for banks for disabling/restricting mobile devices in the event of loan default: What you should know | Business News  Hindustan Times
ai_summary: New RBI norms are creating regulatory obstacles for state governments' crop loan waiver schemes, particularly affecting TVK's announced promises. These restrictions impact the mechanics of large-scale loan forgiveness programs by imposing stricter compliance requirements on participating banks.

impact.tele_collections: Collection activities must cease immediately upon notification of waiver eligibility; teams need clear criteria to identify waiver-covered accounts and halt recovery actions to avoid regulatory penalties.
impact.field_collections: Field agents cannot pursue recovery on loans covered under RBI-approved waiver schemes; requires real-time access to waiver beneficiary lists and updated account status to prevent unauthorized recovery attempts.
impact.legal_team: Legal executives must review existing recovery cases for potential waiver applicability, maintain audit trails of waiver notifications, and ensure compliance documentation with RBI directives on debt forgiveness programs.

compliance_action: Immediately establish a waiver identification protocol; cross-reference all active recovery cases against RBI-issued waiver beneficiary lists; document all waiver-related directives received; update recovery policies within 15 days.

course_module.title: RBI Loan Waiver Schemes: Compliance Framework for Recovery Teams
learning_points: Identification and verification of RBI-approved waiver schemes and eligible borrower categories
Mandatory cessation protocols and documentation requirements when accounts fall under waiver coverage
Regulatory penalties for unauthorized recovery on waiver-protected loans and compliance audit procedures
